J0520_PAIN_THRPY_CD Pain interference with therapy activities Indicates how much of the time, over the past 5 days, the patient has limited their participation in rehabilitation therapy sessions due to pain. 0. Does not apply – I have not received rehabilitation therapy in the past 5 days
